title: Standardize `next: NextAffordance[]` affdance hints across all 30 .opencode/tools/
boundary: Tool output JSON shape standardization — all `.opencode/tools/*.ts` tool modules
consumer_purpose: Model/TUI consumers that read tool output JSON to suggest next actions. The standardized `next` field makes tool output machine-actionable for auto-pilot, TUI hint bars, and LLM tool-calling chains.
claim_atoms: 1. Extend NextAffordance with when+args fields; 2. Add toolCategory() mappings for 30 plugin tool IDs; 3. Add per-tool affordance specs in affordancesAfterSuccess(); 4. Add standardized next: NextAffordance[] to all 30 plugin tool JSON outputs; 5. Migrate 10+ ad-hoc hint/next/recommendation fields to the standard format
